system.description: Unreliable Ork weapons are not Unreliable in an Ork’s hands. Ork technology defies the laws of physics and engineering, functioning through a combination of brute force and the latent psychic field generated by the Ork race. Ork weapons and equipment, while crude and unreliable in the hands of other races, work just fine for Orks. An Ork never suffers penalties for using Ork-made equipment.
